description.ko: 시간이 새겨놓은 흙과 바위의 거칠고 층층이 쌓인 질감을 보여주는 대지의 지형학적 서사.
description.en: A topographic narrative of the land, showcasing the rough, layered textures of earth and rock carved by time.

prompt: Hyper-realistic satellite photography of TERRA-1, titled 'The Tectonic Scroll.' Focusing on complex geological textures, abstract patterns of dry cracked riverbeds in #8B4513 sienna and #D2691E ochre. Vibrant #F4A460 sand dunes merge with deep #2F4F4F slate mineral veins. Top-down perspective, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, emphasizing the organic flows of sediment and erosion. Sharp focus on surface erosion patterns and layered sedimentary rock formations.
